title: leucas stormsii var. parviflora
intro: Leucas stormsii var. parviflora, also known as the Indian pennywort or parviflora leucas, is a plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to extract its medicinal compounds and promote health benefits.
